Home¬їLifestyle¬їCeleb News¬їLocal Celebs¬ївАШSo proudвАЩ: Rachel Kolisi, Springboks WAGS show Tatjana love

Rachel Kolisi showed sister-in-law Tatjana Smith some love after she bagged South Africa their first gold medal at the Paris Olympics 2024.

Siya KolisiвАЩs wife, Rachel Kolisi showed her sister-in-lawTatjana Smithsome love after the South African swimmer won the womenвАЩs 100m breaststroke at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Monday 29 July.

South African swimmer Tatjana Smith bagged South Africa their first gold medal when she won the womenвАЩs 100m breaststroke at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Monday 29 July. She finished ahead of ChinaвАЩs¬†Qianting Tang¬†and IrelandвАЩs¬†Mona McSharry.

The Olympic swimmer took to Instagram to celebrate, and dedicate her win to South Africa. Take a lookвА¶

вАЬFor my community, for South Africa. Now for the 200 вП∞,вАЭ she captioned the post.

A post shared by -TATJANA-SCHOENMAKER- (@tatjanaschoen)

Tatjana is married to Joel Smith, who is Rachel KolisiвАЩs brother. Rachel took to the comments section, along with other Springboks WAGS to show Tatjana some love.

вАЬSo so proud of you Tati! Well done вЭ§пЄП,вАЭ commented Rachel.

вАЬWoohoooo!!! WELL DONE¬†@tatjanaschoen¬†рЯ•≥рЯЩМрЯ•≥рЯШБрЯТХ,вАЭ commented Anlia Etzebeth, the wife of Springbok Eben Etzebeth.

вАЬвЭ§пЄПрЯ•ЗрЯЗњрЯЗ¶,вАЭ commented Springbok Damian Gaza.

HereвАЩssix things to know about Tatjana.

Tatjana revealed that it took a village to get her where she is today and she knows they would be so proud of her. She expressed that she dedicates the win to her village, and her country, South Africa.

вАЬThe emotions were really вА¶ it took a village to get me where I am today. I know they would have been proud, even if I didnвАЩt get a medal, but it was really for them,вАЭ she said.

вАЬIt was for everyone that has been with me, who believed in me and for my country as well. Our hashtag is вАШfor my country вА¶вАЩ it really is, just to inspire someone at home and to know that they donвАЩt have to disqualify themselves and potentially be an Olympic champion,вАЭ she continued.

title: 'So proud': Rachel Kolisi, Springboks WAGS show Tatjana love
author: Alicia Naidoo
description: Rachel Kolisi showed sister-in-law Tatjana Smith some love after she bagged South Africa their first gold medal at the Paris Olympics 2024.
